title: satureja serpyllifolia subsp. brachycalyx
intro: Satureja serpyllifolia subsp. brachycalyx, also known as mountain savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of mountain savory include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as congestion and coughs. Mountain savory can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region.
